discipline: Native QBL cross-read tables written and hashed before Weil targets are constructed.
candidate_rules: commutator_defect: Q/B coordinate commutator defect over prefix histories
shared_prefix_symbol_count: symbol-level LCP length between W_r=(BQ)^r and W_s=(BQ)^s
latch_overlap_count: shared completed six-orientation L-boundary count
dual_prefix_count: min(r,-s mod N) unary-dual overlap
